positive: A minimalist, stylized forest scene. A single, geometric totem pole composed of intertwined crescent moons, stylized arrows, and blooming mandalas stands prominently in the center. The background features simplified, layered birch trees with clean, contrasting white silhouettes against a deep twilight sky. The ground is represented by abstract, smooth river stones and stylized foliage patterns. Use a highly graphic, flat-design aesthetic with strong black line art outlining every element. Color palette should be limited to deep indigo, matte forest green, creamy beige, and crisp white. The overall composition must be highly scalable and designed for maximum visual impact on a t-shirt print. Studio lighting, perfect symmetry, high contrast, clean vectors, intricate details, trending on ArtStation.
